assertionResults.reason: Modal appeared and displayed real metadata fetched from backend check_bucket endpoint: Symbol=PREMIA, Name=Premia, Decimals=18. The fix in commit 5d12591 corrected the URL from '/bucket?' to '/check_bucket?', so the fetch now returns 200 with metadata instead of 404.

Token saved to localStorage with real metadata: {chainId:1, address:'0x6399c842dd2be3de30bf99bc7d1bbf6fa3650e70', symbol:'PREMIA', name:'Premia', decimals:18}. Token appears in autocomplete with symbol 'PREMIA' not truncated address. Autocomplete option shows 'PREMIA Premia 0x6399c842dd2be3de30bf99bc7d1bbf6fa3650e70'.

Full end-to-end flow confirmed: (1) Navigated to http://localhost:5173, (2) Pasted 0x6399c842dd2be3de30bf99bc7d1bbf6fa3650e70 into Token field, (3) Clicked Get Price, (4) Unknown token modal appeared with real metadata (PREMIA/Premia/18), (5) Clicked 'Save to Local List', (6) Token appeared in autocomplete as 'PREMIA Premia', (7) Price result displayed: $0.0579 via UniswapMultiplexer.
